# Scaled rounding-mode Convert symbols from CUDA 12.9 — single-channel only.
# Shape: SRC+STEP, DST+STEP, SIZE, MISC:NppRoundMode, CONST_SCALAR
# C1RSfs only — no C3RSfs/C4RSfs exist in NPP.
# 16f is excluded from the safe layer.
nppiConvert_8u8s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_8u8s_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_16s8s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_16s8s_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_16u8s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_16u8s_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_16u16s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_16u16s_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32f8s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32f8s_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32f8u_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32f8u_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32f16u_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32f16u_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32f16s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32f16s_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32f32u_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32f32u_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32f32s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32f32s_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32s16u_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32s16u_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32s16s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32s16s_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32u8u_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32u8u_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32u8s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32u8s_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32u16u_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32u16u_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32u16s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32u16s_C1RSfs_Ctx
nppiConvert_32u32s_C1RSfs
nppiConvert_32u32s_C1RSfs_Ctx
